## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss using AI-powered content generation tools like AirOps for building a technical glossary and other content initiatives at Clark.](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's team can help build out Clark's glossary and other content using AI tools in a cost-effective way](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [The process involves seeding content with AI, human review/editing, and continuous optimization](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Marcel offers a workshop to learn the process, as well as a dedicated resource to manage the content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)

## Topics

### Introduction & Background

  - [Alex is part of the growth team at Clark, focused on building out a glossary as an SEO play](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Marcel previously built large successful content programs like SecurityIntelligence.com using traditional methods](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [He has now transitioned to an AI-powered content approach to increase efficiency and scale](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

### Marcel's AI Content Generation Process

  - [Decompose the content creation process into steps that can be automated with AI](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Use prompts to generate initial drafts, research, titles, etc. from AI](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Have a dedicated human editor review, refine and optimize the AI output](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Build a "command center" to manage all content topics, keywords, existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Continuously enrich and update content that is performing well based on data](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)

### Potential Engagement

  - [$9k/month for a dedicated resource working in Clark's environment](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Can produce 5-20 long-form articles per week depending on requirements](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Also handles other tasks like link building, CMS updates, image generation](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [6-week onboarding process to set up the customized workflow](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)

### Workshop Option

  - [$500 for Marcel's 5-hour hands-on workshop teaching the AI content process](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Includes access to a community sharing prompts, templates, tips](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [Potential for Clark team to attend and evaluate further collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alex to share details with Nick Parsons, Director of Marketing at Clark](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [Potentially schedule another call with Nick to discuss further](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Consider attending the $500 workshop in June to get hands-on experience](https://fathom.video/share/zbxoHJYou72wd7CZ86sruPCd42MtJoHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
